title: IAInteractables
description: Addon for ItemsAdder that adds ability to make custom furnaces and workbenches with a lot of customization.
body:
# IAInteractables

**Custom furnaces and workbenches for Minecraft 1.20.5-1.21.x with ItemsAdder integration.**

## Features
- ⚙️ Fully customizable furnaces, smithing tables and workbenches with arbitrary recipes
  - Multiple different ingredients
  - Fully customizable fillers
- 🎨 ItemsAdder items and furniture support
  - Contents of the furnaces are tied to the location of the furnace itself, not the player
- 🎯 Flexible slot system and GUI structure
  - Any GUI structure (up to 6 rows)
- ✨ Custom particles, progress bar and sounds during cooking
- 📗 Custom recipe book for your furnaces, smithing tables and workbenches with integration of recipies from IA, CustomCrafting and Craftorithm.
- 🔨 In-game GUI recipe editor for both custom furniture and vanilla workstantions (crafting table, furnace and smithing table)

## Requirements
- Paper/Spigot/Purpur 1.20.5+
- Java 21+
- PlaceholderAPI
- ItemsAdder v4

## Commands
- `/interactables reload` - Reload configuration
- `/interactables editor` - Opens recipe editor

## Permissions
- `iainteractables.admin` - Admin commands access

## Configuration
Each furnace/workbench/smithing table is configured via separate YAML file in:
- `plugins/IAInteractables/furnaces/`
- `plugins/IAInteractables/workbenches/`
- `plugins/IAInteractables/smithing_tables/`
Recipe book is configured via IAInteractables/config.yml

## Future plugin plans
- 1.5.x: Creation of automatization with redstone and hoppers
- 1.6.x: Multiblock structure support
- 2.0.x: Pipes, wires, custom fluids and energy support
- 2.1.x and higher: Most likely this plugin will stop being available for public, as I want to hardcode content for my own server, any bugs still will be fixed, maybe some small updates will continue being released.

## Author
FireFurryGrib
